component.name: Chaser
component.summary: Bloxstrap-style launcher for Sober (Roblox on Linux)

description.p: Chaser is the missing cockpit for Sober: switchable performance profiles, a curated risk-tagged FastFlag catalog, one-click presets, MangoHud and environment control, and automatic config backups — the launcher layer Windows players know from Bloxstrap, built natively for Linux with GTK4.
Chaser never modifies the Roblox client. It edits Sober's own configuration surface, preserves everything it doesn't manage, and backs up before every change.

screenshot.caption: Play page: Sober status, active profile, one-click launch
